name: Vegetables and Side Dishes
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred and scald cabbage as for pirohi filling.
2. Fry in oil until golden brown.
3. Cook peas until tender.
4. Mash the peas until they are the consistency of butter.
5. Mix all ingredients together.
6. Cook together in a pot or frying pan, seasoning to taste.
Pearl Barley and Buckwheat:
1. Boil until done.
2. Drain.
3. Add onion mixture.
Rice:
1. Cook until tender.
2. Add chicken broth and onion mixture.
3. Place in oven and bake until blended.
Potatoes:
1. Peel potatoes.
2. Cook in salted water until tender but firm.
3. Toast bread slices (white, rye) and grind to crumbs.
4. Pour onion mixture over potatoes and roll or shake with bread crumbs.
Lima Beans and Green Beans:
1. Cook dry beans separately until tender.
2. Drain and season to taste.
